all.critique:
Below is our review of the logic analysis with notes on issues and their associated severity:

1. Compression Ratio Interpretation  
 – The analysis correctly identifies that the config value of 0.15 (with the “0.15%” comment) must be converted as 0.15/100, yet this dual interpretation (a fraction versus an already normalized value) might lead to confusion.
